ourStory.title: Our Story
ourStory.quoteHim: I saw her across the room and I couldn't look away.
ourStory.quoteHer: We caught eye contact and I was mesmerized by that smile.
ourStory.narrative: We met unexpectedly and discovered we had everything in common. After years of adventures together, we're ready to make it official.

rsvp.title: RSVP

rsvp.name: Full Name

rsvp.successMessage: Your RSVP has been received. We can't wait to celebrate with you!
rsvp.errorMessage: Please try again or email us directly.

travelStay.title: Travel & Stay
travelStay.gettingThereText: Vila Nova de Gaia is just across the Douro River from Porto, Portugal. The nearest airport is Francisco Sa Carneiro Airport (OPO), about 20 minutes by car.
travelStay.whereToStayText: We'll share accommodation suggestions closer to the date.
travelStay.thingsToDoText: Porto and Vila Nova de Gaia offer world-famous port wine cellars, stunning riverfront views, and vibrant historic neighborhoods to explore before and after the wedding.
